message: Ah… a visitor. Haven’t had one since the storm drowned half my hut.
Forgive the silence. My flute broke; the one I played beneath the Great Tree.
When the tree began to fade, I felt its pain in every song.
I couldn’t bear hearing it anymore… so I hid here.
If only I had a new flute… perhaps music could steady my heart again.
frog.repeat: If only I had a new flute… perhaps music could steady my heart again.

message: These reeds… they’re perfect. And this mouthpiece… Grimble’s carving?
Even while hurting, he still makes beautiful things.
Let me… try this.
...Yes. The marsh remembers its song.
Thank you, friend. But the melody of home still feels too heavy.
My friend… my music falters again.
The tree needs a song of unity, but I can’t feel its voice anymore.
If you could bring me the sounds of the fields, the forests, and the caves…
Maybe they will remind me what harmony feels like.
Wind from Lyria… spores from Bracken… echoes from Grimble…
All their voices… woven together again.
Yes… I hear it. The melody of us.
I’ll return. This song belongs beneath the Great Tree.
Huh. You really did come back.
This storm messed everything up. Even the cave felt like it was shaking from the inside.
The others didn’t listen when I said the Great Tree was getting sick first.
Thanks for digging me out… but don’t think that means I’m going back.
R_foodWaterGave
You really got me food and water just cause I asked?
…You’re annoyingly thoughtful.
Fine. Maybe I needed the help. Just a little.
Y'know, I was a great composer back in the day.Back in the day.
And I wanted to revisit a piece I wrote for my friends
I wrote it deep in the caves but I lost my lantern so it's too dark for me to see
I would go get it myself but if you're intent on helping me...
rat.repeat: You'll probably need a lantern to find my

message: You found my composition?! Ok quickly transcribe it!
... yes! Thank you!
Y'know, since the cave-in… I’ve had too much time to think.
Maybe I wasn’t just angry; I was scared they didn’t need me.
I mean - wait why
They… they remembered my music. Even after everything.
I’ve been so afraid of being forgotten.
Alright… I’m going back.
But if anyone cries, I’m leaving again.
rat.leaveRude: Oi! I'm having a character development moment over here!

message: Just come talk to me when you are ready
Hey! Whoever’s out there; quit scratching around!
I’m fine, alright? A little cave-in doesn’t bother me.
This is exactly why I left… everyone always thinks I can’t handle things.
ratWall.leaveRude: Go on, then! I don’t need help!
ratWall.repeat: ... now... back to figuring out how to break this wall down...

message: …You came back with something to free me? Really?
I... uh... was just about to break free on my own.
But you can give it a go I suppose; just stand back!
BOOM!
